zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard Reade於1490年出生在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾波丁頓時，他的父親John William Reade30歲，母親Lady Margaret Beauchamp18歲。他於大約1515年與Jane Rudhall在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1544年7月18日在他的家鄉享年54歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard Reade于1490年出生在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾波丁頓时，他的父亲John William Reade30岁，母亲Lady Margaret Beauchamp18岁。他于大约1515年与Jane Rudhall在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1544年7月18日在他的家乡享年54岁。

nameMeanings.name: Reade
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Read
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Reed  .

History: A family called Read were established in America in the early 18th century by John Read, who was born in Dublin, sixth in descent from Sir Thomas Read of Berkshire, England. His son, George Read (1733–98), was one of the signers of the Declaration of Independence, and as a lawyer helped frame the Constitution.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. en.lifeSummary: When Richard Reade was born in 1490, in Boddington, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, his father, John William Reade, was 30 and his mother, Lady Margaret Beauchamp, was 18. He married Jane Rudhall about 1515, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 18 July 1544, in his hometown, at the age of 54.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard Reade est né en 1490, à Boddington, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John William Reade, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Lady Margaret Beauchamp, avait 18 ans. Il a épousé Jane Rudhall environ 1515, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 18 juillet 1544, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 54 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richard Reade 1490 in Boddington, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John William Reade 30 und seine Mutter Lady Margaret Beauchamp 18. Er hat um 1515 in England, United Kingdom Jane Rudhall geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 18. Juli 1544 im Alter von 54 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

Lui sposato Jane Rudhall circa 1515, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 18 luglio 1544, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 54 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard Readeが1490年にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアボッドイントンで生まれた時，父John William Readeは30歳，母Lady Margaret Beauchampは18歳であった。約1515年にイギリスイギリスでJane Rudhallと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1544年7月18日に故郷で54歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Reade(이)가 1490년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 보딩턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John William Reade(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Margaret Beauchamp(은)는 18세였다. 그는 대략 1515년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Jane Rudhall(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1544년 7월 18일 그의 고향에서 54세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ele casou-se com Jane Rudhall aproximadamente 1515, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 18 de julho de 1544, em sua cidade natal, com 54 anos.

ru.Stanford on Teme, Worcestershire, Englan: станфорд он тем, ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard Reade родился в 1490 г. в местности боддингтон, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John William Reade было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Margaret Beauchamp, 18. Он женился на женщине по имени Jane Rudhall около 1515 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер 18 июля 1544 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 54 лет.
